caption: A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a dark blazer over a white shirt, stands on a stage next to a large digital presentation screen. The screen displays a dark blue background with a geometric network pattern and the text "INTERFACE: CRYPTOMANAGER" in large white letters. Below this heading, several lines of Python code are visible, starting with "from crypto_xl_manager import CryptoManager as cm". At the bottom of the presentation area, a white banner features the "europython" logo alongside a green snake icon and the text "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, gesturing with his hands as he speaks to an unseen audience. His facial expressions shift slightly, and he moves his arms to emphasize points, while the digital content on the screen remains static across the frames.
